source: Errors and Vulnerabilities in AI-Generated Code.pdf
notes: Six-page reference table cataloging 18 error categories in AI-generated code (security, architecture, deployment, debt, compliance). Mapped to existing SoNash pattern-check coverage; two genuine gaps (hallucinated deps, license scanning). Existing vocabulary covers the entries without needing new tags.
